title: KYC/AML Policy
subtitle: Know Your Customer and Anti-Money Laundering
introduction: QuikkRed is committed to preventing money laundering and terrorist financing. This policy outlines our approach to customer due diligence and compliance with applicable KYC and AML regulations.

kycRequirements.title: KYC Requirements
kycRequirements.description: All customers must provide the following documents for identity and address verification:

amlMeasures.title: AML Measures
amlMeasures.description: We implement the following measures to prevent money laundering:
items: Transaction monitoring and suspicious activity reporting
Enhanced due diligence for high-risk customers
Regular staff training on AML procedures
Maintenance of transaction records as per regulatory requirements

reporting.title: Reporting Obligations
reporting.description: We comply with all reporting requirements under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) and report suspicious transactions to the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU-IND).

customerObligations.title: Customer Obligations
items: Update KYC documents when they change or expire

principalOfficer.title: Principal Officer
principalOfficer.description: For any queries related to KYC/AML compliance, please contact:
principalOfficer.name: Mr. Rahul Sharma

footerNote: This policy is subject to change based on regulatory updates and is reviewed annually.
